summary: Customer Experience Reset Pass iteration 2 - All 4 user-reported fixes verified. (1) Login redirect: Customer login now correctly redirects to /home, not /my-enquiries. (2) Bottom tab bar: NOT shown on landing page when not logged in, IS shown on /home when logged in. (3) GET /api/rms/available returns exactly 3 RMs. (4) Customer home is fully dark themed (bg-[#0B0B0D]).
critical_code_review_comments: FIX 1 VERIFIED: AuthPage.js, LoginPage.js, GoogleAuthCallback.js all redirect customers to /home instead of /my-enquiries
FIX 2 VERIFIED: BottomTabBar only shows when isAuthenticated is true (App.js line 148: hideTabBar includes !isAuthenticated)
FIX 3 VERIFIED: GET /api/rms/available returns exactly 3 RMs (fills with busy RMs if needed)
FIX 4 VERIFIED: CustomerHome.js has bg-[#0B0B0D] dark theme throughout
ProtectedRoute correctly redirects unauthenticated customer routes to /auth (not /login)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer Experience Reset Pass iteration 2 complete. All 4 user-reported issues fixed and verified: (1) Login redirect to /home, (2) Bottom tab bar auth-aware, (3) 3 RMs returned, (4) Dark theme on customer home.
